speaker: speaker1
text: Would you care to join for the picnic tomorrow ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Much to my regret , I'll have to meet my girlfriend at the airport then .

speaker: speaker1
text: We'd like to invite you for our dress party tomorrow evening , are you free ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Much as we'd like to , but we've booked up already for that time .

speaker: speaker1
text: What a pity ! You can't join us .

speaker: speaker2
text: So sorry . Next time we'll go , thanks anyway .
